title: Conventional-commits profile
description: Variables added when commits are parsed (which is the default for git-cliff via `commit_parsers`).

Group.description: The commit group, typically derived from the conventional-commit type and overridden by `[git.commit_parsers]`.

Scope.description: The conventional-commit scope (the text between parentheses after the type), or null if absent.

Breaking.description: True if this commit is marked as a breaking change (via `!` after the type or a `BREAKING CHANGE:` footer).

BreakingDescription.description: The description of the breaking change, sourced from the `BREAKING CHANGE:` footer.

IsConventional.description: True if the commit message parsed cleanly as a conventional commit.

FooterArray.description: Trailers parsed from the commit message footer block.

Footer.description: A single trailer (footer line) from a commit message.

separator.description: The separator between the token and the value (usually `:`).

value.description: The trailer value (everything after the separator).

breaking.description: True if this trailer marks the commit as breaking (`BREAKING CHANGE:` footer).
